summary: Iter14 testing of 5 user-requested changes: (1) SEO meta description + og:/twitter:card tags in /index.html, (2) TopNav full-width spanning over AdRail (z-50), (3) condensed ADMIN dropdown with role-aware items, (4) /terms + /privacy long-form content, (5) Refer a Mofo block on /wallet. Backend: 79/79 previous iter9-13 tests still pass (0 regressions); new test_iter14_smoke_and_meta.py adds 8 passing + 1 skipped tests covering /api/auth/me, /api/admin/ads CRUD+RBAC, /api/admin/ads/analytics, /api/health/time, and the SEO meta tag spot-check on the served /index.html. Frontend: TopNav verified full-width (right=1920, vw=1920) with z-index=50 (above AdRail z-20) on both /dashboard and /wallet; admin dropdown trigger visible for admin and opens all 5 items (Disputes/Latency/Ads/Ad analytics/Ad managers) which navigate correctly; regular user (davidjovanic) does NOT see the trigger; Terms page renders 'Terms and Conditions of Use' heading, 'LEGAL · LAST UPDATED 24 JUNE 2026' tag, all 7 numbered sections and named clauses (Legally Binding Agreement, No Monetary Value, Cheating Prohibition, Liability Cap, AUD $1); Privacy page renders 'Privacy Policy' + all 13 sections plus key phrases (We do not sell your personal information, 13 years and older, Australian Privacy Act 1988, helpdesk@gomofos.com); Footer rendered on both /terms and /privacy; /wallet shows wallet-refer-a-mofo with 'REFER A MOFO — get 500 CR per friend' text and button.

ui_bugs.issue:
React hydration warning:

    , but in section 3 the children contain a

action_items:
(LOW) In /app/frontend/src/pages/Terms.js, Section 3 'Earning Credits' Item: either change the Item wrapper from

to

(since children may contain block elements like
    ), or refactor the 'Earning Credits' content to emit the
      as a sibling of the

      . Fixes the React hydration warning.
critical_code_review_comments: TopNav.js: clean. Conditional rendering of admin items (isAdmin vs canManageAds) correctly suppresses Disputes/Latency/Ad-managers for ad-manager-only users. DropdownMenuItem onSelect navigate(it.to) is the right pattern with Radix — auto-closes on select. data-testid coverage complete on trigger, content, and every item.

TopNav.js layout: 'relative z-50 xl:-mr-[200px]' correctly escapes ProtectedRoute's xl:pr-[200px] container; verified getBoundingClientRect().right = window.innerWidth on /dashboard and /wallet at 1920px viewport. Inner content uses max-w-7xl mx-auto so nav items stay centered while the underlying bar extends edge-to-edge.
Terms.js & Privacy.js: well-structured Section/Item/SubSection helpers, full long-form copy embedded as JSX (no fetch needed). One minor invalid-HTML issue noted above (ul inside p in Section 3).
Wallet.js: ReferAMofo embed wrapped in data-testid='wallet-refer-a-mofo' placed above transaction history — visible and functional. Reuses existing component, no duplication.

public/index.html: meta description (long-form), og:title/description/type/image, twitter:card all present. NOTE: changes to public/index.html require a frontend supervisor restart to be served — CRA dev server does NOT hot-reload public/ files. This is environmental, not a code bug.

success_rate.backend: 100% (79/79 iter9-13 regression + 8/8 iter14 smoke executed; 1 ad-manager analytics test skipped because /api/admin/users does not exist on this backend — backend FE-binding for can_manage_ads was already validated in iter12+iter13)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (TopNav full-width + z-50 verified on /dashboard and /wallet; admin dropdown opens with all 5 items for admin and navigates correctly; regular user hides dropdown; Terms 7 sections + named clauses present; Privacy 13 sections + all required phrases present; Footer on both legal pages; wallet REFER A MOFO block present)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted one ephemeral ad TEST_iter14_smoke_ad during pytest. No persistent test data left behind. No ad-manager promotion performed (endpoint /api/admin/users 404 — promotion path verified in iter12/iter13 baseline still passing).
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Iter14 baseline = 79/79 iter9-13 regression + 8/8 iter14 smoke (1 skip for ad-manager dropdown UI — backend RBAC already covered in iter12/13). IMPORTANT environment note: changes to /app/frontend/public/index.html require `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` to be picked up; the running CRA dev server caches public/ at startup and does NOT hot-reload it. The only frontend bug found is a minor React hydration warning in /app/frontend/src/pages/Terms.js Item helper (Section 3 'Earning Credits' embeds a
    inside a

    ). Suggest changing Item's wrapper from

    to

    . Test files: /app/backend/tests/test_iter14_smoke_and_meta.py. Backend URL: https://bet-esports.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca of the issue:
Terms.js Item component renders `

{k}: {children}

`. In Section 3, the 'Earning Credits' Item passes children that include a `
    ` block element. HTML spec disallows block elements inside `

    `, and React hydrates this as the parent `

    ` auto-closing before the `

      `, producing visible content but throwing a hydration mismatch warning. Mitigation: change Item to render `
      ` instead of `

      ` (1-line fix at /app/frontend/src/pages/Terms.js line 79).
